instructions: Read AGENT_HANDOFF.md at the repo root before generating any files.
Replace index.html content between FORMAUT:REPLACE markers with the real site.
Replace admin/index.html FORMAUT:REPLACE:ADMIN_SECTIONS with real editable sections.
Each admin section should read and write to Supabase site_data via the Formaut relay.
Stage all generated files through Formaut writeback/approval before committing live.
Do not place secrets, tokens, or credentials in any generated HTML or JSON file.
next_steps: Generate index.html: replace hero and content markers with real site content.
Generate admin/index.html: replace admin sections marker with editable panel modules.
Wire admin sections to Supabase site_data via agent token and relay URL.
Submit all changes as agent writeback proposals through the Formaut Dashboard.
